title: monday service AI webinar

posts.author: M_Glass (Michelle Glass)
posts.cookedHtml:
Did you know that chatbots can now handle up to 80% of Tier 1 support requests? (I just found this out recently) It sounds crazy, but the stats speak for themselves - AI is truly taking care of the repetitive stuff so your team doesn’t have to.

On October 21st, we’re going live to share what we learned: real monday.com use cases, practical workflows, and zero tech jargon. Just the good stuff that actually saves time…and your team’s sanity.

Bring your questions (and if needed, your skepticism). Leave with ideas and a plan you’ll want to test right away.

Reserve your spot: https://lnkd.in/db7diFAw
